title: Settings

password.title: ComfyCarry Password
password.err_min_length: Password must be at least 4 characters

api_key.title: ComfyCarry API Key
api_key.help: For external scripts or apps to access the API via X-API-Key / Bearer
api_key.regenerate_confirm:
Regenerate API Key?

The old key will be immediately invalidated. All external apps using the old key will need to be updated.

config.title: Import/Export Config
config.export_desc: Export all ComfyCarry configuration as a JSON file
config.import_desc: Restore configuration from a JSON file

reinit.title: Re-initialize
reinit.help: Delete ComfyUI and return to setup wizard. System dependencies and PyTorch are preserved
reinit.confirm_keep:
Re-initialize?

This will delete ComfyUI installation (keeping model files), stop ComfyUI and sync services, and return to the setup wizard.

System dependencies, PyTorch, and Tunnel are not affected.
reinit.confirm_delete:
Re-initialize?

This will delete the entire ComfyUI directory (including all model files), stop ComfyUI and sync services, and return to the setup wizard.

Model files will be permanently deleted!
reinit.confirm_delete_final:
All model files will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

Continue?
reinit.success: Reset complete, redirecting to setup wizard...

restart_confirm:
Restart ComfyCarry?

The page will be briefly unavailable.
restarting: ComfyCarry is restarting, auto-refresh in 3 seconds...

civitai.title: CivitAI API Key
civitai.desc: Generate API Key from CivitAI Account Settings

params.title: Parameters
params.temperature_help: 0.0 - 2.0. Higher = more creative, lower = more stable. Recommended: creative 0.8-1.2, translation/description 0.3-0.5
params.max_tokens_help: Maximum output length in tokens. Prompt generation usually needs 500-1000, longer conversations may need more
params.stream_help: When enabled, LLM will output response token by token. Disable to avoid content filtering issues on some platforms
